results.title: Haunted 3D Echoes Of The Past Box Office Collection Day 3: Vikram Bhatt's Film Mints 3.60 Crore, Beats Bharat Bhagyavidhaata & Main Vaapas Aaunga
results.description: Haunted 3D: Echoes Of The Past witnessed further growth on Day 3, earning Rs 3.60 crore net across India. The film's collection rose 10.8% from Saturday. Released alongside Bharat Bhagyavidhaata and Main Vaapas Aaunga, the horror sequel has collected Rs 9.35 crore net so far and remains the strongest performer among the new releases.

results.title: Eric Trump and UFC Controversy: Allegations of Insider Information
results.description: A strange controversy unfolded at UFC Freedom 250, where Eric Trump allegedly sought insider information from UFC commentator Daniel Cormier. The incident began with a now-deleted social media post showing a direct message exchange between the two, raising questions about the integrity of the event. Cormier's strong response and Trump's denial of the allegations added fuel to the fire, leading to widespread speculation online. This incident is just one of many controversies surrounding the UFC event, which has already attracted attention due to its political implications and Trump's financial ties to the UFC. As the situation develops, the authenticity of the messages remains unverified.

results.title: JDU Nagaland Youth flays Konsakhul killings
results.description: DIMAPUR: Janata Dal (United) Nagaland State Youth Wing has condemned the recent killing of six innocent Nagas in Manipur, terming the incident a “tragic and senseless act” and a grave violation of humanity and peace.In a statement, JDU Nagaland Youth president Mhao Yanthan said there could be “absolutely no justification for violence against innocent individuals,” [...] The post JDU Nagaland Youth flays Konsakhul killings first appeared on Nagaland Post .
results.source: Nagaland Post - Get The Latest Nagaland News, Brea

results.title: ‘They did not just fix my AC’: Delhi woman gets emotional after AC technicians stop their work to admire her paintings
results.description: Mehak Vithal, a software developer from Delhi, shared a video of AC repairmen admiring her paintings. The technicians paused their work to appreciate her artwork. They expressed surprise and awe at her creations. Vithal was touched by their genuine reactions. The video went viral, resonating with many online viewers. The simple act of appreciation made her day.

results.title: Noida airport opens with IndiGo arrival
results.description: Noida International Airport has commenced flight operations. Its first IndiGo flight arrived from Lucknow and then departed back to the Uttar Pradesh capital. This marks a significant step for air connectivity in the region. The new airport aims to boost travel and economic development. It is designed as a multimodal transport hub.
